species: We hypothesized human fecal MUC2 (HF-MUC2) was accessible for purification...
tissue: The O-glycoprotein Mucin-2 (MUC2) forms the protective colon mucus layer.
disease_state: MUC2 could be similarly analyzed from inflammatory bowel disease stools...
sample_source: Given our observation of intact mucus on human feces...
age: Healthy donors were adult males or females ages 22 to 44...
cell_line: using a rabbit polyclonal anti-MUC2 IgG antisera originally developed against the colon carcinoma line LS174T...
strain: feces from wild-type (WT) mice as a control...
